headline: How Henry Schein (HSIC) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Fair Value Targets
summary: Henry Schein is back in focus after the modeled fair value price target was reset from US$83.21 to US$89.79, reflecting updated assumptions in the latest analyst work. Across Wall Street, this shift lines up with research that has become more constructive following Q4 results and initial FY26 guidance, even as some firms stick with Neutral or Hold views. As you read on, you will see how these differing price targets and opinions shape an evolving narrative around opportunity, risk, and what...
